findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Table of contents outline numbering changed from Roman numerals to Arabic numerals
findings.evidence: PDF uses Roman numerals (I, II, III, IV) for the report outline on page 1. HTML converts these to Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3, 4) as a numbered list. The actual section headings in the body retain Roman numerals.
